commands.review_summary:
The branch adds LiteLLM spend/limit text to personal and team budget rows, suppresses the duplicate budgeted LiteLLM provider-cost section, and adds focused menu model regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect by source inspection: LiteLLM team aliases flow into resetDescription, and the PR renders that string as metric detail text without redaction. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor needs to fix the redaction issue and provide after-fix real behavior proof; automation should not be requested while contributor proof is still missing.

target.title: Show LiteLLM budget spend details
target.body:
## Summary
- Show LiteLLM personal and team spend/budget amounts directly on the budget rows while preserving reset time text.
- Hide the duplicate budgeted LiteLLM extra usage section, while keeping spend-only API spend visible.
- Add regression coverage for LiteLLM budget row details and duplicate cost suppression.

## Test Plan
- [x] `swift test --filter LiteLLMMenuCardModelTests`
- [x] `swift test --filter MenuCardKiloPassTests`
- [x] `swift test --filter MenuDescriptorKiloTests`
- [x] `.build/lint-tools/bin/swiftformat Sources Tests --lint`
- [x] `.build/lint-tools/bin/swiftlint --strict`
- [x] `git diff --check`

## Notes
- `./Scripts/lint.sh lint` currently fails locally on `docs/site.js` because `node --check` treats it as CommonJS while the file uses an ESM `import`. This failure is outside the files changed here.
target.author: hololee
